member.name: P:Origam.Workflow.WorkflowEngine.InputContexts
member.summary: Input context stores when this block is called as a subworkflow

member.name: P:Origam.Workflow.WorkflowEngine.ParentContexts
member.summary: Context stores of the parent block that this block will use

member.name: M:Origam.Workflow.WorkflowEngine.IsFailureHandled(Origam.Schema.WorkflowModel.IWorkflowStep)
member.summary: Returns true if there is a task in the workflow that handles failures.

member.name: T:Origam.Workflow.SimpleModelData
member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.name: T:Origam.Workflow.SimpleModelData.OrigamEntityDataTable
member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.

member.name: T:Origam.Workflow.SimpleModelData.OrigamFieldDataTable
member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.

member.name: M:Origam.Workflow.StateMachineService.FieldsChanged(System.Collections.Generic.List{Origam.Schema.WorkflowModel.StateMachineEventFieldDependency},System.Data.DataRow,Origam.DA.StateMachineServiceStatelessEventType)
member.summary: Test if any of the field dependencies were updated in the data.
member.param: Data row with the data on which the test will be done.
member.returns: True if the field changed (on update) or if the field has a value (on create). For deletes this function will always return True because on delete operation basically all fields were changed, no matter if there are any dependencies or not. Also if there are no dependencies True is always returned.

member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.name: M:Origam.Workflow.WorkQueue.WorkQueueService.GenerateNotificationMessage(System.Guid,Origam.Service.Core.IXmlContainer,System.Data.DataRow,System.Data.DataRow,System.String)
member.summary: Prepare a data to be sent as a notification.
member.param: notificationSource Input context for transformation - data taken either from WorkQueue Entry or fetched by refId
member.returns: Xml containing in the first row of the first table non-empty fields named "Body" and "Subject"

member.name: M:Origam.Workflow.WorkQueue.WorkQueueService.HandleAction(System.Guid,System.String,System.Data.DataTable,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Handles work queue actions from the UI. WILL NOT CREATE TRANSACTIONS!

member.name: M:Origam.Workflow.WorkQueue.WorkQueueService.UnlockQueueItems(System.Data.DataTable,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Unlocks work queue entries in a separate (new) database transaction
member.param: This should be set if you call the function from within catch handler. In that case the original transaction has been rollbacked and even already removed entries has been recreated. We need to reflect that state in the dataset (reject changes) and that way unlock deleted rows.

member.name: T:Origam.Workflow.WorkQueue.WorkQueueWorkflowLoader
member.summary: Connection string: name - name of the workflowLoader defined at the WorkQueueClass. The workflow called must implement IWorkQueueLoader workflow defined in the OrigamRoot model. anything else - input workflow parameters - constant text values as defined in the connection string

member.name: T:GsmLink.EncodingScheme
member.summary: Specifies the method to use in encoding the data contained in the property of an instance.

member.name: F:GsmLink.EncodingScheme.Text
member.summary: Specifies that the data is encoded as text, using the GSM 7-bit default character set.

member.name: F:GsmLink.EncodingScheme.Data
member.summary: Specifies that the data is encoded as 8-bit binary data.

member.name: F:GsmLink.EncodingScheme.Unknown
member.summary: Specifies that the type of encoding is unknown.

member.name: T:GsmLink.MessageType
member.summary: Specifies the type of the SMS message.

member.name: F:GsmLink.MessageType.SmsDeliver
member.summary: Specifies that the SMS message originated from the SMSC and delivered to the GSM device.

member.name: F:GsmLink.MessageType.SmsSubmit
member.summary: Specifies that the SMS message originated from the GSM device and submitted to the SMSC for delivery to another GSM device.

member.name: F:GsmLink.MessageType.Unknown
member.summary: Specifies that the SMS message is of unknown type.

member.name: T:GsmLink.SyncOptions
member.summary: Specifies the synchronization options used by the class.
member.remarks: This enumeration is a bit field.

member.name: F:GsmLink.SyncOptions.None
member.summary: Specifies that synchronization is turned off.

member.name: F:GsmLink.SyncOptions.AutoSendReceive
member.summary: Specifies that the will continuously poll the physical GSM device for new messages, send queued messages, and check the status of the GSM device.

member.name: F:GsmLink.SyncOptions.AutoDelete
member.summary: Specifies that when copies new SMS messages from the physical GSM device to its internal message caches (i.e. Inbox, Outbox, Sent), the original SMS messages left in the GSM device are deleted.

member.name: F:GsmLink.SyncOptions.AutoNotify
member.summary: Specifies that the will raise events.

member.name: F:GsmLink.SyncOptions.AutoPersist
member.summary: Specifies that the will automatically save the contents of its internal message caches (i.e. Inbox, Outbox, Sent) using a .

member.name: F:GsmLink.SyncOptions.All
member.summary: Specifies that all options are turned on.
